ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission – Due Date Approaching
ham.body:
Hi Prof. Sharma,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to remind you that the semester project submission is due next week on 30th April 2026. I have attached the final draft of my project report for your review.

Please let me know if you need any additional information or if there are any changes that should be made.

Thank you for your guidance and support.

Best regards,
Rahul Kumar
Computer Science 4th Year

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

We hope you are doing well. Our records indicate that your QuickBooks subscription has an outstanding balance of INR 18,500. As per the latest policy, you must settle this invoice within 24 hours to avoid service interruption. If you do not comply, your account may be suspended.

Please click on the link below to complete the payment securely:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
QuickBooks Support Team
QuickBooks India
